name: Dr. Ayesha Rahman
description: Highly experienced cardiologist specializing in the diagnosis, treatment, and prevention of heart diseases. She is dedicated to providing personalized care, advanced cardiac evaluations, and lifestyle guidance to help patients maintain long-term heart health and improve their overall well-being.

name: Dr. Mahmud Hasan
description: Expert neurologist with extensive experience in treating disorders of the brain, spinal cord, and nervous system. He focuses on accurate diagnosis, evidence-based treatment plans, and compassionate care to improve patients' neurological health and quality of life.

name: Dr. Sarah Islam
description: Experienced dermatologist specializing in the diagnosis and treatment of skin, hair, and nail conditions. She offers advanced solutions for acne, eczema, pigmentation issues, and cosmetic skin concerns while ensuring personalized patient care.

name: Dr. Tanvir Ahmed
description: Highly skilled orthopedic surgeon specializing in bone, joint, muscle, and sports-related injuries. He is committed to helping patients regain mobility, reduce pain, and achieve a better quality of life through modern orthopedic treatments and surgical procedures.

name: Dr. Nusrat Jahan
description: Dedicated gynecologist providing expert care for women's health, pregnancy, childbirth, and reproductive health concerns. She focuses on delivering compassionate treatment, preventive care, and professional guidance at every stage of life.

name: Dr. Imran Hossain
description: Compassionate pediatrician specializing in the healthcare and development of infants, children, and adolescents. He provides preventive care, routine checkups, vaccinations, and treatment for a wide range of childhood illnesses and health conditions.

name: Dr. Farhana Kabir
description: Experienced ENT specialist treating conditions related to the ear, nose, throat, head, and neck. She utilizes modern diagnostic methods and advanced treatment approaches to provide effective and comfortable patient care.

name: Dr. Rezaul Karim
description: Trusted general physician providing comprehensive medical consultations, preventive healthcare, and treatment for common illnesses. He is dedicated to early diagnosis, patient education, and long-term wellness management for individuals and families.
